user.title: Connect Suning Biu
user.description: Enter the mobile number used for Suning SMS login. The integration now signs the family and device requests automatically.

captcha.title: Complete captcha
captcha.description: Suning requires additional verification before sending the SMS code. For IAR, Home Assistant will show a verification page link. Complete the puzzle there and this flow will continue automatically.

sms_code.title: Enter SMS code
sms_code.description: Enter the SMS verification code that Suning sent to the configured phone number.

reauth_confirm.title: Reconnect Suning Biu
reauth_confirm.description: Suning session for {phone_number} has expired. Submit this step to send a new SMS code and complete reauthentication.

family.title: Select family
family.description: Choose the Suning family whose devices should be imported into Home Assistant.

error.dependency_not_ready: The required Suning runtime dependency could not be loaded. Check Home Assistant logs for the requirement installation error.
error.invalid_auth: The SMS code is invalid or expired.
error.captcha_not_ready: Captcha has not been completed yet.
error.no_supported_devices: No supported air conditioner devices were found in the selected family.

abort.already_configured: This Suning account is already configured.
abort.captcha_session_expired: The captcha session expired. Restart the login flow and try again.
